tasks.label: gh-auth-check
tasks.command: command -v gh >/dev/null 2>&1 && gh --version && gh auth status

tasks.label: check-gh-presence
tasks.command: if command -v gh >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo GH_FOUND; else echo GH_MISSING; fi

tasks.label: check-brew-presence
tasks.command: if command -v brew >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo BREW_FOUND; else echo BREW_MISSING; fi
